Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Normative process Start Receive order Then Check inventory If sufficient Receive Check Authorize payment Package items Ship order Close order If insufficient Receive Check Cancel order Close order

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Key constraints Authorize payment only after Check inventory and before Package items Package items only after authorization and before shipping Ship order only after packaging and never after cancellation Close order is the final activity in all scenarios No packaging shipping after cancellation No authorizing payment before checking inventory

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1 Receive order Check inventory Authorize payment Package items Ship order Close order Matches exactly the sufficient inventory flow No violation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 2 Receive order Check inventory Package items Violation Authorize payment should occur before Package items Here Package items happens before Authorize payment Authorize payment Ship order Close order Violation Package items occurs before Authorize payment

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 3 Receive order Check inventory Authorize payment Cancel order Ship order Violation Ship order occurs after Cancel order Also items were not packaged Shipping after cancellation is explicitly forbidden Close order Violation Ship order occurs after Cancel order

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 4 Receive order Check inventory Cancel order Close order Matches exactly the insufficient inventory flow No violation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 5 Receive order Check inventory Authorize payment Ship order Violation Package items must occur after authorization and before shipping Here Ship order occurs without Package items Close order Violation Ship order occurs without Package items happening first

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 2 Package items occurs before Authorize payment The normative description states that Package items should only occur after authorization and before shipping Case 3 Ship order occurs after Cancel order The description explicitly states that Ship order should only occur after packaging and never after a cancellation Case 5 Ship order occurs without a preceding Package items activity The description states that Only after items have been properly packaged is it appropriate to proceed with Ship order
